tagline: Creating Outdoor Environments That Exceed All Your Expectations

hero.headline:
Your Dream Backyard Starts
Right Here
hero.subheadline: For over two decades, Kansas City families have trusted Stonebridge Outdoor to design and build complete outdoor living spaces. From custom pools to hardscapes and lighting, we handle every detail so you can simply enjoy the result.

services.label: Our Expertise
services.headline: Complete Outdoor Living<br class="hidden md:block"> Solutions Under One Roof
services.subtitle: No more juggling multiple contractors. From the pool to the patio to the plantings, Stonebridge Outdoor designs, builds, and maintains every element of your outdoor space.

cards.title: Pool Design & Installation
cards.description: Custom pools designed around your property, lifestyle, and vision. From concept sketches to the first splash, we build backyard oases that last generations.

cards.title: Hardscapes & Patios
cards.description: Patios, retaining walls, outdoor kitchens, fire pits, and walkways crafted with premium materials that stand up to Missouri weather year after year.

cards.title: Landscape & Softscapes
cards.description: Thoughtful plantings, garden design, sod installation, and ornamental beds that bring color, texture, and life to complement your hardscape investment.

cards.title: Irrigation & Sprinklers
cards.description: Smart irrigation systems designed, installed, and maintained to keep your landscape thriving through Kansas City's hot summers without wasting a drop.

cards.title: Landscape Lighting
cards.description: Custom night-lighting that transforms your outdoor space after dark. Enhance beauty, improve safety, and extend your evenings outside all year long.

cards.title: Water Features & Drainage
cards.description: From tranquil fountains to engineered drainage solutions, we manage water to protect your property and add visual interest to your landscape.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Your Perfect Outdoor Space

steps.title: Share Your Vision
steps.description: Tell us about your property and your dreams for it. We'll visit your home, listen carefully, and provide a detailed design consultation at no cost or obligation.

steps.title: We Design & Build
steps.description: Our team creates custom plans tailored to your space. With 21 years of experience, we manage every phase of construction so you never have to coordinate multiple contractors.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Outdoor Oasis
steps.description: Step into a backyard that exceeds your expectations. And with our ongoing property management services, your outdoor space stays beautiful season after season.

about.label: Why Kansas City Trusts Us
about.headline: Family-Owned Since 2005 — Built on Passion and Integrity
about.description: Mike Crist started working outdoors at age 13 and never stopped. What began as Aquaturf in 2005 has grown into Stonebridge Outdoor, a full-service outdoor living company serving the Kansas City metro. With over two decades of hands-on experience, our team is painstakingly committed to custom design and superior service. We don't do cookie-cutter — every project is built around your property, your lifestyle, and your vision.

features.title: One Team, Complete Solutions
features.description: Pool, patio, plantings, lighting, irrigation — all designed and built by one company. No subcontractor headaches, no finger-pointing.

features.title: Custom Design, Every Project
features.description: We never use templates. Every outdoor space is designed from scratch to fit your property's unique layout, soil, drainage, and sun exposure.

features.title: Under-Promise, Over-Deliver
features.description: It's not just a saying — it's how we've earned a 4.6-star reputation over 21 years. We show up when we say we will and finish what we start.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every project starts with a free consultation and a detailed written estimate. No hidden fees, no change-order games — just honest pricing for exceptional work.

guarantee.headline: Our "Exceed Expectations" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If any aspect of your project doesn't meet the standards we promised, we'll come back and make it right at no additional cost. We've built our 21-year reputation on following through, and we're not about to stop now. Your complete satisfaction isn't a goal — it's our standard.

faqs.question: How long does a typical outdoor project take?
faqs.answer: Timelines vary by scope. A patio or landscape project may take 1-3 weeks, while a full pool and outdoor living space can take 8-12 weeks. We'll give you a detailed timeline during your free consultation and keep you updated every step of the way.

faqs.question: Do you handle the entire project or just parts of it?
faqs.answer: We handle everything. Pool, hardscape, softscape, irrigation, lighting, drainage, water features — all under one roof. That means one point of contact, one cohesive design, and no coordination headaches for you.

faqs.question: What areas around Kansas City do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Raymore, Grandview, Lee's Summit, Belton, Pleasant Hill, South Kansas City, and the surrounding KC metro area. If you're within driving distance, give us a call — we'll make it work.

faqs.question: Can you work with my existing landscape or pool?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Whether you want to renovate an aging pool, add hardscaping around an existing patio, or redesign your entire backyard, we work with what you have and transform it into something extraordinary.

faqs.question: What sets Stonebridge Outdoor apart from other contractors?
faqs.answer: 21 years of experience, a single-source approach to outdoor living, and a founder who has been passionate about this work since he was 13 years old. We're not a franchise or a side hustle — this is all we do, and we do it exceptionally well.

testimonials.name: Dennis Z.
testimonials.text: All of the folks that we worked with were courteous, professional and did a fantastic job. Stonebridge exceeded every expectation we had for the project.

testimonials.name: Julie G.
testimonials.text: From start to finish, Stonebridge under-promised and over-delivered, following through on multiple changes as the project evolved. Could not be happier with the result.

testimonials.name: Steve H.
testimonials.text: Stonebridge is the BEST! They were always very professional and could be counted on to do what they said they would do. Our backyard is now our favorite room.

contact.headline:
Ready to Transform
Your Backyard?
contact.subtitle: Get a free design consultation with no pressure and no obligation. We'll visit your property, listen to your vision, and show you what's possible.

footer.description: Family-owned outdoor living company. Serving Kansas City since 2005.
